title: Information processing system, pos system, information processing method, and computer-readable storage medium storing program
abstract: An information processing system includes a storage unit, a communication unit and a control unit. The storage unit stores restaurant information and a menu item page. The restaurant information includes menu item information about food menu items that at least one restaurant is able to provide. The menu item page constitutes a restaurant information providing page group regarding the at least one restaurant, and contains at least part of the menu item information. The communication unit receives POS data from a POS system located at the at least one restaurant. The POS data includes at least one of the number of orders, amount of sales and rate of profit in each predetermined period at the at least one restaurant. The control unit updates the menu item information on the menu item page on the basis of the received POS data.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS: 1. An information processing system (100) characterized by comprising: a storage unit (18) that stores restaurant information and a menu item page, the restaurant information including menu item information about food menu items that at least one restaurant is able to provide, the menu item page constituting a restaurant information providing page group regarding the at least one restaurant and containing at least part of the menu item information; a communication unit (19) that receives POS data from a POS system (200A, 200B) located at the at least one restaurant, the POS data including at least one of the number of orders, amount of sales and rate of profit in each predetermined period at the at least one restaurant; and a control unit (11) that updates the menu item information on the menu item page on the basis of the received POS data. 2. The information processing system according to claim 1 , wherein the control unit updates the menu item information on the menu item page to menu item information, of which at least one of the number of orders, amount of sales and rate of profit in the predetermined period is included in a predetermined number of higher ranks, on the basis of the POS data. 3. The information processing system according to claim 1 , wherein the control unit updates the menu item information on the menu item page to menu item information, of which at least one of the number of orders and amount of sales in the predetermined period is included in a predetermined number of lower ranks, on the basis of the POS data. 4. The information processing system according to claim 1 , wherein the menu item page has a menu item information display field (54a, 54b) for each 

 time period within business hours of the at least one restaurant, the communication unit receives sales data of each time period from the POS system, and the control unit updates menu item information in the menu item information display field of each time period on the basis of the received sales data of the corresponding time period. 5. The information processing system according to claim 1, wherein the communication unit is able to receive the POS data from the POS system of a first restaurant and the POS system of at least one second restaurant, and the control unit updates menu item information on a restaurant information providing site of the first restaurant on the basis of the POS data of the at least one second restaurant such that menu item information at the first restaurant, corresponding to menu items of which the number of orders or the amount of sales is included in a predetermined number of higher ranks at the at least one second restaurant, is provided. 6. The information processing system according to claim 5, wherein the restaurant information at least includes information about a location, scale and food type of each restaurant, and the control unit calculates a similarity between the first restaurant and another restaurant on the basis of the restaurant information of the first restaurant, and selects another restaurant having a similarity larger than or equal to a predetermined value as the at least one second restaurant. 7. A POS system (200A, 200B) characterized by comprising: a storage unit that stores restaurant information and POS data, the restaurant information including menu item information about food menu items that a corresponding restaurant is able to provide, the POS data including at least one of the number of orders, amount of sales and rate of profit of each menu item in each predetermined period at the 

 restaurant; and a cornmunication unit that transmits the POS data to an information processing system (100) including a restaurant information providing page group in order to update menu item information on a menu item page on the basis of the POS data, the menu item page constituting the restaurant information providing page group regarding a restaurant and containing at least part of the menu item information. 8. An information processing method characterized by comprising: storing restaurant information and a menu item page, the restaurant information including menu item information about food menu items that at least one restaurant is able to provide, the menu item page constituting a restaurant information providing page group regarding the at least one restaurant and containing at least part of the menu item information; receiving POS data from a POS system (200A, 200B) located at the at least one restaurant, the POS data including at least one of the number of orders, amount of sales and rate of profit in each predetermined period at the at least one restaurant; and updating the menu item information on the menu item page on the basis of the received POS data. 9. A computer-readable storage medium (18) storing a program, the program causing an information processing system (100) to execute instructions, the instructions characterized by comprising: storing restaurant information and a menu item page, the restaurant information including menu item information about food menu items that at least one restaurant is able to provide, the menu item page constituting a restaurant information providing page group regarding the at least one restaurant and containing at least part of the menu item information; receiving POS data from a POS system (200A, 200B) located at the at least one restaurant, the POS data including at least one of the number of orders, amount of sales and 

 rate of profit in each predetermined period at the at least one restaurant; and updating the menu item information on the menu item page on the basis of the received POS data.
